submodular_budgeted.paper_title: Multi-document Summarization via Budgeted Maximization of Submodular Functions

paper_reference.display: DUC-04 generic summarization table; non-CNN/DM and not directly comparable.
paper_reference.comparability: Current workspace implementation is a CNN/DailyMail single-document adaptation.

submodular_acl2011.paper_title: A Class of Submodular Functions for Document Summarization

paper_reference.display: DUC-04 generic summarization table; paper reports 39.35 / 38.90 in a different DUC setting.
paper_reference.setting: DUC 2004 generic summarization, multi-document CLUTO clustering setup
paper_reference.comparability: Current workspace run is on CNN/DailyMail single-document data with sklearn KMeans.

lexisem.paper_title: LexiSem: A lexical-semantic summary candidate re-ranker

paper_reference.comparability: Reference-aware at test time; not directly comparable to no-reference rerankers.

lexisem.notes: Only smoke checkpoint exists in the workspace right now.

simcls.paper_title: SimCLS: A Simple Framework for Contrastive Learning of Abstractive Summarization

paper_reference.comparability: Full official test outputs are available locally; unified extra-metric postprocess now supports full-set evaluation.

brio_ctr.paper_title: BRIO: Bringing Order to Abstractive Summarization

paper_reference.comparability: Full official checkpoint and CNN/DailyMail test data are available locally; unified extra-metric postprocess supports full-set evaluation.

summa_reranker.paper_title: SummaReranker: A Multi-Task Mixture-of-Experts Re-ranker for Abstractive Summarization

paper_reference.setting: CNN/DM transfer setup, PEGASUS + SR, paper Table 5
paper_reference.comparability: Paper-best result is on PEGASUS + SR; the local reproduction now exposes a full unified-eval wrapper over the available CNN/DM reranker assets.

factedit.paper_title: Correcting Diverse Factual Errors in Abstractive Summarization via Post-Editing and Language Model Infilling

paper_reference.setting: CNN/DM, FACT EDIT row, paper Table 1
paper_reference.comparability: Local correction + unified extra-metric pipeline now supports full-set evaluation; official OpenIE and Ent-DAE remain optional add-ons.

consum_fenice_0_75.paper_title: Toward Factual Summarization through Consensus and Consistency

paper_reference.setting: CNN/DM, BART, FENICE-0.75, hypotheses as pseudo-references, paper Table 2
paper_reference.comparability: Local reproduction follows the same minimal BART/Y=R setting and now exposes a full unified-eval wrapper; asset completeness still determines immediate runnability.

consum_fenice_0_75.notes: The package also exposes baseline, FENICE-0.0, and MBR-1.0 companion systems.
